requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz, Type C / NBR 14136 Plugs, INTN NP Standards (IEC 62368 / IEC 60950 Harmonised)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz，C型/NBR 14136插头，INTN NP标准（与IEC 62368/IEC 60950协调）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz，C型/NBR 14136插頭，INTN NP標準（與IEC 62368/IEC 60950協調）

summary.en: Paraguay operates on 220 V / 50 Hz mains electricity. The standard plug type is Type C (European Schuko-compatible 2-pin round plug); the Mercosur NBR 14136 plug standard (used in Brazil and adopted across Mercosur) is also present and increasingly common in Paraguay. Wi-Fi routers, IoT hubs, smart devices, and other mains-powered wireless equipment must be compatible with this electrical system. Electrical safety compliance for electronic equipment in Paraguay is governed by INTN NP standards, many of which are harmonised with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety — the successor to IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065) and related IEC standards, often via Mercosur NM harmonisation. Electrical safety test evidence is typically submitted as part of the CONATEL homologación dossier. China-export devices designed for 220 V / 50 Hz (common in Chinese domestic market) are electrically voltage-compatible, but plug compatibility (Type C / NBR 14136 vs Chinese Type I / two-flat-pin) must be addressed via an appropriate adapter or localised plug, and the IEC 62368-1 harmonised NP standard compliance must be confirmed.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭使用220V/50Hz市电。标准插头类型为C型（欧式兼容双圆脚插头）；Mercosur NBR 14136插头标准（在巴西使用并在Mercosur范围内推广）在巴拉圭也有普及，且日益常见。Wi-Fi路由器、物联网集线器、智能设备及其他需要市电供电的无线设备须与该电气系统兼容。巴拉圭电子设备的电气安全合规由INTN NP标准规管，其中许多与IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全——IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065的后继标准）及相关IEC标准协调，通常通过Mercosur NM协调体系实现。电气安全检测证据通常作为CONATEL型式认可文件的组成部分提交。面向出口中国的220V/50Hz设备（中国国内市场常用）在电压上兼容，但插头兼容性（C型/NBR 14136与中国I型/两扁脚插头）须通过合适的转换头或本地化插头解决，且须确认符合IEC 62368-1协调NP标准。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭使用220V/50Hz市電。標準插頭類型為C型（歐式相容雙圓腳插頭）；Mercosur NBR 14136插頭標準（在巴西使用並在Mercosur範圍內推廣）在巴拉圭也有普及，且日益常見。Wi-Fi路由器、物聯網集線器、智慧裝置及其他需要市電供電的無線裝置須與該電氣系統相容。巴拉圭電子裝置的電氣安全合規由INTN NP標準規管，其中許多與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通信技術設備安全——IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065的後繼標準）及相關IEC標準協調，通常透過Mercosur NM協調體系實現。電氣安全檢測證據通常作為CONATEL型式認可文件的組成部分提交。面向出口中國的220V/50Hz裝置（中國國內市場常用）在電壓上相容，但插頭相容性（C型/NBR 14136與中國I型/兩扁腳插頭）須透過合適的轉換頭或本地化插頭解決，且須確認符合IEC 62368-1協調NP標準。

standards_or_laws: INTN NP standards — NP electrical safety standards harmonised with IEC 62368-1 and IEC 60950-1 via Mercosur NM framework; administered by the Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (successor to IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065; basis for Mercosur NM harmonisation)
Mercosur NM (Norma Mercosur) — regional electrical safety norms harmonised across Paraguay, Brazil, Argentina, and Uruguay
NBR 14136 — Mercosur plug and socket standard (Brazilian origin, adopted across Mercosur including Paraguay)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information technology and consumer electronics is covered under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) referencing GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1, being updated to IEC 62368-1 basis under GB 4943.1-2022) and GB 8898 for audio/video equipment. China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I (two flat pins, AS/NZS 3112 style) or combined Type I/C sockets, with Type A plugs also common. CCC is not recognised in Paraguay. Chinese GB 4943.1 safety testing provides a useful technical base as IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 heritage, but separate INTN NP standard compliance must be confirmed.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和消费电子产品的电气安全在CCC（中国强制认证）体系下覆盖，引用了GB 4943.1（等同于IEC 60950-1，正依据GB 4943.1-2022更新为IEC 62368-1基础）和音视频设备的GB 8898。中国采用220V/50Hz，使用I型插头（两扁脚，AS/NZS 3112风格）或I/C组合插座，A型插头也较常见。CCC不被巴拉圭承认。中国GB 4943.1安全测试提供了有用的IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950-1技术基础，但须单独确认符合INTN NP标准。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和消費電子產品的電氣安全在CCC（中國強制認證）體系下覆蓋，引用了GB 4943.1（等同於IEC 60950-1，正依據GB 4943.1-2022更新為IEC 62368-1基礎）和音視頻裝置的GB 8898。中國採用220V/50Hz，使用I型插頭（兩扁腳，AS/NZS 3112風格）或I/C組合插座，A型插頭也較常見。CCC不被巴拉圭承認。中國GB 4943.1安全測試提供了有用的IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950-1技術基礎，但須單獨確認符合INTN NP標準。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — covers electrical safety for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
GB 4943.1-2022 — Chinese electrical safety standard for information technology equipment (IEC 62368-1 basis)
GB 8898 — Chinese electrical safety standard for audio/video equipment

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Paraguay. INTN NP standards (IEC 62368-1 harmonised via Mercosur NM) apply. China exports at 220 V / 50 Hz voltage are electrically compatible with Paraguay's mains, but the Chinese Type I / flat-pin plug is not compatible with Paraguay's Type C (European 2-pin) or NBR 14136 (Mercosur) sockets — a localised plug or appropriate certified adapter is required. IEC 62368-1 test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories may be acceptable as supporting evidence within the CONATEL homologación dossier, subject to acceptance of the specific NP standard version.
gap.zh: CCC电气安全认证不被巴拉圭承认。适用INTN NP标准（通过Mercosur NM与IEC 62368-1协调）。中国出口220V/50Hz电压与巴拉圭市电兼容，但中国I型/扁脚插头与巴拉圭C型（欧式双圆脚）或NBR 14136（Mercosur）插座不兼容——须使用本地化插头或经认证的合适转换头。经ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1检测报告在CONATEL型式认可文件中可作为支持证据，但须经具体NP标准版本接受确认。
gap.zht: CCC電氣安全認證不被巴拉圭承認。適用INTN NP標準（透過Mercosur NM與IEC 62368-1協調）。中國出口220V/50Hz電壓與巴拉圭市電相容，但中國I型/扁腳插頭與巴拉圭C型（歐式雙圓腳）或NBR 14136（Mercosur）插座不相容——須使用本地化插頭或經認證的合適轉換頭。經ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1檢測報告在CONATEL型式認可文件中可作為支持證據，但須經具體NP標準版本接受確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety compliance under applicable INTN NP / Mercosur NM standards required; plug compatibility with Type C / NBR 14136 required; typically evidenced as part of CONATEL homologación dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC covers electrical safety for consumer electronics in China; GB 4943.1 (IEC 62368-1 basis) applies

source.publisher: INTN — Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología (Paraguay)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance under INTN NP / Mercosur NM standards (IEC 62368-1 harmonised) is required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Paraguay. CCC is not recognised. Paraguay uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type C (European 2-pin) and NBR 14136 (Mercosur) plugs — devices must be supplied with compatible plugs or certified adapters. IEC 62368-1 test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories may serve as supporting evidence in the CONATEL homologación dossier. Verify applicable NP standard versions and plug requirements with a qualified Paraguayan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴拉圭销售的市电供电无线及物联网设备须符合INTN NP/Mercosur NM标准（与IEC 62368-1协调）的电气安全要求。CCC不被承认。巴拉圭采用220V/50Hz，使用C型（欧式双圆脚）和NBR 14136（Mercosur）插头——设备须配备兼容插头或经认证的转换头。经ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1检测报告可作为CONATEL型式认可文件中的支持证据。进入市场前请向合格的巴拉圭监管专业人士核验适用NP标准版本和插头要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴拉圭銷售的市電供電無線及物聯網裝置須符合INTN NP/Mercosur NM標準（與IEC 62368-1協調）的電氣安全要求。CCC不被承認。巴拉圭採用220V/50Hz，使用C型（歐式雙圓腳）和NBR 14136（Mercosur）插頭——裝置須配備相容插頭或經認證的轉換頭。經ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1檢測報告可作為CONATEL型式認可文件中的支持證據。進入市場前請向合格的巴拉圭監管專業人士核驗適用NP標準版本和插頭要求。
